description_long: This is a life-sized statue of a standing human figure, draped in a long cloak that covers most of the body and falls to the feet. The figure appears to be male, with a cap or head covering, and is depicted with hands clasped in front, holding an object or possibly the folds of the cloak. The statue stands atop a rectangular pedestal, which itself is mounted on a square stone base. The surface of the sculpture is smooth and light-colored, likely made of marble or a similar stone, with subtle textural details in the clothing and facial features. The rear view shows the cloak cascading down the back, with no visible openings or interactive elements.
description: A life-sized statue of a cloaked human figure standing on a rectangular pedestal, rendered in smooth, light-colored stone. The figure's hands are clasped in front, and the cloak drapes elegantly to the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, clasped hands, and detailed folds of the cloak.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the drape of the cloak and the figure's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the cloak and the back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile and the way the cloak falls along the body.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a stone base, suggesting an outdoor urban or park setting.
